Landing.heading: What would you like to build?
Landing.description: Describe your website and we'll generate it in seconds.
Landing.placeholder: e.g. "A portfolio site for a photographer with a dark theme and image gallery"
Landing.inputLabel: Describe the website you want to build
Landing.example1: A portfolio site for a photographer with a dark theme, image gallery, and contact form
Landing.example2: A landing page for a coffee shop with menu, hours, location map, and online ordering
Landing.example3: A personal blog with a minimalist design, featured posts section, and newsletter signup
Landing.example4: A SaaS product landing page with pricing tiers, feature comparison, and testimonials

Chat.inputHelp: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

Message.generationFailed: Generation failed. You can try again.
Message.interrupted: Previous generation was interrupted. Please try again.
Message.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

Info.title: About WebsitePls
Info.description: WebsitePls generates a single web page from your description using AI. You can refine the result by sending follow-up messages in the chat.
Info.feature1: Generates one page based on your prompt
Info.feature3: Download or open in a new tab

Login.heading: Sign in to WebsitePls
Login.description: Sign in to save your projects and get more generations.
Login.terms: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service.
Login.emailSent: We sent a sign-in link to {email}
Login.errorOAuth: This email is already associated with another sign-in method.
Login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Projects.heading: My Projects
Projects.noProjects: No projects yet. Create your first one!
Projects.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete this project and all its versions. This action cannot be undone.
Projects.deleteError: Failed to delete project. Please try again.
Projects.deleteGeneratingError: Cannot delete a project while it is generating.

AuthError.configuration_description: There's a problem with the server configuration. Please try again later.
AuthError.accessDenied_description: You don't have permission to sign in.
AuthError.verification_description: The sign-in link is no longer valid. It may have been used already or expired. Please request a new one.
AuthError.oauthSignin_description: Could not start the sign-in process. Please try again.
AuthError.oauthCallback_description: Something went wrong during sign-in. Please try again.
AuthError.oauthAccountNotLinked_description: This email is already associated with another sign-in method. Please sign in using your original method (Google, GitHub, or email link).
AuthError.default_description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

VerifyEmail.heading: Check your email
VerifyEmail.description: We sent a sign-in link to your email address. Click the link to sign in.

Error.heading: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

NotFound.heading: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

Metadata.title: WebsitePls — AI Website Generator
Metadata.description: Describe your website and generate it in seconds with AI.
